# Hedical

> AI-powered healthcare navigation tools for patients and caregivers. Decode medical bills, appeal insurance denials, simplify clinical documentation, and manage medications.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://hedical.com
- Medical Bill & Denial Navigator: https://hedical.com/products/bill-denial-navigator
- Niche Documentation Tool: https://hedical.com/products/documentation-tool
- Polypharmacy Manager: https://hedical.com/products/polypharmacy-manager
- Pricing: https://hedical.com/pricing
- Guides: https://hedical.com/guides
- CO-50 Denial Code Guide: https://hedical.com/guides/co-50-denial-code
- About: https://hedical.com/about
- Waitlist: https://hedical.com/waitlist
- Contact: https://hedical.com/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://hedical.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://hedical.com/terms

## Products

### Medical Bill & Denial Navigator
Upload medical bills, EOBs, and denial letters. Get plain-English explanations, error detection, and AI-drafted appeal letters. Uses OCR + Claude AI for document analysis. Free for basic analysis; per-use and subscription tiers for appeal letters.

### Niche Documentation Tool
Ambient-scribe-style assistant for allied health, ABA therapy, lactation, nutrition, and small dental practices. Specialty-specific note templates, auto-generated patient instructions, HIPAA-aware voice & text input, EHR export.

### Polypharmacy Manager
Upload medication lists for multi-profile caregiver support. Drug-supplement-OTC interaction checks in plain language. Printable medication summaries and questions to ask your doctor.

## Pricing

- Free: Basic bill/EOB analysis, error flagging, plain-English explanations
- Per-Use ($19/letter): Full appeal letter generation, priority processing
- Unlimited ($9/mo): Unlimited appeal letters, priority support, all features

## Stack

- Next.js 16 (App Router, Turbopack)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS v4
- Groq (Llama 3.3 70B + Qwen vision models)
- Vercel Analytics

## Key differentiators

- Non-diagnostic, informational/administrative only
- No insurance login required — upload documents directly
- AI-drafted, you review before sending
- Evidence-based letters citing plan-specific policy
- Multi-profile caregiver support
- Built for solo founders — LLM + OCR APIs, no clinical trials or enterprise sales
